query:
ALTER TABLE hub_news 
ADD COLUMN sourceType ENUM('EU_OFFICIAL', 'GS1_OFFICIAL', 'INDUSTRY', 'MEDIA') DEFAULT 'EU_OFFICIAL',
ADD COLUMN retrievedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN isAutomated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
